title: lakeland Deep Multipurpose Cleaning Caddy White – Tall Sides Prevent Items Falling Out Wipe-Clean
features: Generously sized caddy to carry all your cleaning product essentials from room to room with ease
With its comfy soft grip handle, it sits nicely in your hand as you go about your cleaning tasks
Not just for cleaning products, it would be just as useful for bottles in the bathroom
Or for storing small household or garden tools. It will also keep your cleaning cupboard tidy!
Buy this product from Lakeland & you can return it for up to 3 years. Proof of purchase is necessary
description: On cleaning day, instead of rooting around under the sink or in a cupboard to gather your kit and caboodle together, keep it all organised and ready for action in this Deep Multipurpose Cleaning Caddy. Sturdy and practical Made from strong and sturdy polypropylene and with deep sides to keep bottles and sprays from toppling over, it has two compartments so you could keep window cleaning paraphernalia in one side and kitchen cleaning bottles and cloths in the other. Or, keep your dedicated bathroom cleaners stored safely inside, then they’ll always be ready to be called into action should you need them in the smallest room. Easy to move around A comfortable central handle trimmed in duck-egg blue makes the caddy easy to carry around as you do your chores, and it can also be used for transporting all kinds of equipment and tools around in, indoors and out – you could keep one in your garage to keep your car cleaning kit neatly together, for example. Wipe-clean polypropylene. 35.5 x 29.5 x 28.5cm H.
